creator: bas@area536.com
text:
Getting a build error when building this for arm64.aarch64 through Poudriere on amd64. Other packages do build fine. The full build log is here:

https://builder.area536.com/data/14-1-release-aarch64-latest/2024-08-13_10h10m47s/logs/errors/bash-completion-2.14.0,2.log

Most pertinent fragment:

===>  Extracting for bash-completion-2.14.0,2
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for bash-completion-2.14.0.tar.xz.
tar: Pathname can't be converted from UTF-8 to current locale.
tar: Pathname can't be converted from UTF-8 to current locale.
tar: Pathname can't be converted from UTF-8 to current locale.
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
===>  Failed to extract "/portdistfiles//bash-completion-2.14.0.tar.xz".
*** Error code 1
